title: python podman create and start
body:
- Added alias 'container()' to image model for CreateContainer()
- Fixed return in containers_create.go to wrap error in varlink
  exception
- Added a wait time to container.kill(), number of seconds to wait
  for the container to change state
- Refactored cached_property() to use system libraries
- Refactored tests to speed up performance

Signed-off-by: Jhon Honce <jhonce@redhat.com>

comments.body: @baude We need to talk about the client getting a template from the service for Create.  Or, all the empty fields will be set as needed by the service.  And yes, there is an update to a go file in this PR. :+1:
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably d252fa7) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
